name: doc-quality-partially-filled
anchor: Doc quality axis: partially-filled loan application
rationale: loan_application doc has most fields filled but omits annual_income + credit_score. Broker email provides loan_amount + property_value + refi context. F1.LA + F1.PV resolve via doc-tier. F1.AI + F1.CS canonical fields have no source. Tests partial-doc extraction + missing-field cascade.
notes: Single-event sequence. Stresses LLM-extraction graceful-degradation on incomplete docs.
